title: Mixed scalar + vector
description: foo(x) = x[1] + sum(x[2]). The argument is a tuple of a scalar and a vector. Watch the scalar gradient travel as rdata (a value, returned) while the vector gradient travels as fdata (a buffer, accumulated in place).
